# CTOS Portfolio Roadmap
# 03 — Architecture Layer (RMD v1.0)

## Objective

Build a production-grade architecture capable of supporting:

- Hero System Visualization
- Command Palette
- Visitor Globe
- Certificate Vault
- SVG Morphing System
- Analytics Layer
- Multi-language Content
- Future Awwwards-Level Motion

Without creating technical debt.

---

# Strategic Architecture Principles

## Principle 01

Astro First

Use Astro whenever interactivity is not required.

---

## Principle 02

Vue Islands Only

Hydrate only interactive components.

---

## Principle 03

Content Driven

Content should drive rendering.

Never hardcode projects.

---

## Principle 04

Performance Before Effects

Do not sacrifice performance for visual effects.

---

# Current Architecture Assessment

## Strengths

- Astro Architecture
- Content Collections
- Cloudflare Deployment
- SEO Foundation

## Gaps

- Hero Visualization Layer
- Command Palette Layer
- SVG Architecture Layer
- Visitor Analytics Layer
- Interaction Engine

---

# Target Architecture Map

src/

assets/
components/
content/
layouts/
pages/
lib/
composables/
stores/
services/
utils/
styles/
types/

---

# Sprint A1 — Component Architecture Standardization

## Goal

Prevent component sprawl.

### Folder Structure

components/

ui/
layout/
navigation/
hero/
project/
case-study/
certificate/
contact/
analytics/
search/
globe/
svg/
animation/

---

## Rules

Maximum Component Size:

300 lines

Maximum Page Size:

200 lines

Complex logic:

Move to composables.

---

# Sprint A2 — Hero Architecture System

## Goal

Convert hero into a system visualization engine.

### Component Tree

hero/

HeroSystemMap.vue
HeroNode.vue
HeroConnection.vue
HeroSignal.vue
HeroTooltip.vue
HeroStats.vue
HeroCTA.vue

---

## Node Categories

Infrastructure

Cloud

Automation

AI

Product

Architecture

---

## Interaction Rules

Hover:

- activate node
- show tooltip
- pulse connected nodes

Click:

- expand metadata panel

---

## Performance Constraints

60fps target

No ThreeJS

SVG First

---

# Sprint A3 — SVG Architecture

## Goal

Build a reusable SVG ecosystem.

### Structure

assets/svg/

raw/
optimized/
morph/

---

svg/

InfrastructureSVG
CloudSVG
AutomationSVG
AISVG
ArchitectureSVG
ProjectSVG
CertificateSVG

---

## SVG Rules

Shared stroke width.

Shared corner radius.

Shared geometry language.

---

## Future Morph Chains

Infrastructure
→ Cloud
→ Automation
→ AI
→ Architecture

Project
→ Case Study
→ Documentation

Certificate
→ Knowledge
→ Capability

---

# Sprint A4 — Search Architecture

## Goal

Global search system.

### Search Sources

Projects

Case Studies

Notes

Certificates

---

### Technology

Fuse.js

Static Index

Generated During Build

---

### Search Layer

lib/search/

build-index.ts
search-engine.ts

---

# Sprint A5 — Command Palette Architecture

## Goal

Keyboard-first navigation.

### Trigger

CTRL + K

CMD + K

---

### Features

Search

Navigation

Theme Switching

Language Switching

Quick Actions

---

### Components

CommandPalette.vue
CommandInput.vue
CommandResults.vue

---

### Accessibility

Keyboard only navigation.

Focus trapping.

ARIA support.

---

# Sprint A6 — Visitor Globe Architecture

## Goal

Build signature feature.

### Rendering Strategy

Lazy Loaded

Intersection Observer

Visible Only

---

### Components

VisitorGlobe.vue
CountryTooltip.vue
GlobeControls.vue

---

### Data Layer

Country

Visits

Last Seen

Trend

---

### Performance Rules

Never load above fold.

Never block LCP.

---

# Sprint A7 — Analytics Architecture

## Goal

Build lightweight analytics layer.

### Sources

Cloudflare Analytics

Custom Metrics

---

### Metrics

Visitors

Countries

Top Pages

Project Views

Certificate Views

---

### Components

VisitorCounter
CountryCounter
AnalyticsOverview

---

# Sprint A8 — Content Architecture Hardening

## Goal

Standardize all content.

### Collections

projects

case-studies

notes

certificates

resume

---

### Rules

All content validated.

All content typed.

All content searchable.

---

# Sprint A9 — Internationalization Architecture

## Goal

Support bilingual content.

### Structure

/en/
/id/

---

### Translation Files

locales/

en.json
id.json

---

### Requirements

Route based localization.

SEO friendly.

---

# Sprint A10 — State Architecture

## Goal

Centralized UI state.

### Stores

Theme

Language

Search

Command Palette

---

### Rule

No unnecessary global state.

---

# Sprint A11 — Motion Infrastructure

## Goal

Prepare for Motion Layer.

### Modules

hero.ts
reveal.ts
cards.ts
svg.ts
navigation.ts
cursor.ts

---

### Rules

No animation code inside pages.

Reusable only.

Composable only.

---

# Architecture Risks

## Risk 01

Overusing Vue.

Mitigation:

Astro First.

---

## Risk 02

Heavy animations.

Mitigation:

Reduced Motion.

Performance budgets.

---

## Risk 03

Component duplication.

Mitigation:

Shared component inventory.

---

# AI Agent Rules

Rule A-01

Prefer Astro.

Rule A-02

Hydrate only interactive islands.

Rule A-03

Never hardcode content.

Rule A-04

Prefer SVG over Canvas.

Rule A-05

Prefer Canvas over ThreeJS.

Rule A-06

Support reduced motion.

Rule A-07

Every architecture decision must preserve Lighthouse >= 90.

---

# Definition of Done

- Hero Architecture implemented.
- SVG Architecture implemented.
- Search Architecture implemented.
- Command Palette implemented.
- Visitor Globe Architecture implemented.
- Analytics Layer implemented.
- Content Architecture hardened.
- i18n Architecture implemented.
- Motion Infrastructure established.

---

# Next Layer

04-experience-layer.rmd
